## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows `type/description` convention
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Added/updated tests (unit + axe)
- [ ] Added/updated stories (including RTL + dark mode)
- [ ] Added/updated MDX docs (or confirmed auto-gen)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] RTL verified
- [ ] Dark mode verified
- [ ] Accessibility verified (keyboard + screen reader)
- [ ] Tree-shaking verified (if adding compound component)
- [ ] Size budget unaffected (check size-limit output)
- [ ] Breaking change? Added codemod in `scripts/codemods/`
